description: Elixium AI — XP-native agile platform. TDD-gated stories, team decisions, learning loop.
name: io.github.IndirectTek/mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Your Elixium API key. Generate one from your workspace card on the Profile tab (Generate Key button).
environmentVariables.name: ELIXIUM_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Your Elixium workspace API URL (e.g., https://your-tenant.elixium.ai/api).
environmentVariables.name: ELIXIUM_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Board slug to scope operations to a specific board. Optional — auto-detects when the workspace has only one board.
environmentVariables.name: ELIXIUM_BOARD_SLUG

environmentVariables.description: Email of the user creating stories. Optional — defaults to the user the API key is bound to.
environmentVariables.name: ELIXIUM_USER_EMAIL
